title: Our Debut Single: Seveneleven

title: New Single Release: Little Tragedies
excerpt: Our newest single 'Little Tragedies' is out now on all major streaming platforms! we put our hearts into this one, so show it some love! thank you to everyone who helped make this project a reality
content: Our newest single 'Little Tragedies' is out now on all major streaming platforms! we put our hearts into this one, so show it some love! thank you to everyone who helped make this project a reality

title: Breaking Sound Presents: Redhed at the Riv
content: Redhed come back to Toronto at the Rivoli! We're back in the city playing the Breaking Sound showcase at the Rivoli March 26th alongisde Josh Keenan and more! come party hard with Redhed on Queen St for a wonderous thursday night! tickets will sell out fast to get yours asap!
